🎓 Lernuz
Platform Partner
Powering smarter education ecosystems across Sri Lanka
Lernuz Plus

Learners Mentorship Program

Lernuz connects students through a structured mentorship system — where senior students guide juniors, creating a safe space to learn, ask doubts, and grow together.



🧠
Structured mentor assignment
Top-performing students are selected as mentors by teachers and assigned to support junior students from lower classes.
📈
Bridging the hesitation gap
Students who feel shy or hesitant to ask questions in class can learn comfortably through peer mentorship.
⚡
Anonymous doubt solving
Students can ask questions anonymously, and mentors respond without identities — removing fear, judgment, and inferiority complex.
M
Mentor
Online & ready
Hi! I'm your mentor. Feel free to ask anything — your identity is completely anonymous 😊
I didn’t understand today's maths problem… can you explain step by step?
Of course! Let’s break it down simply 👇

First, identify the formula used. Then substitute the values given in the question.

If you want, I can solve the exact problem for you.
Yes please… I always get confused in the second step.
No worries, that’s very common 👍

I’ll show you an easier way to approach it so you don’t get stuck again.
↑ Anonymous student–mentor conversation preview
✦ Platform Features

Everything your school needs, unified

One intelligent platform replacing dozens of disconnected tools.

👤
Student Management
Complete student profiles, academic history, health records, and family contacts in one unified view.
Preview · Student Profile UI
📅
Smart Attendance
AI-powered biometric and QR-based attendance with real-time parent notifications and analytics.
Preview · Attendance Dashboard
💳
HNB Fee Payments
Seamless fee collection via HNB Bank .
Preview · Payment Flow UI
📊
Academic Analytics
Deep insights into student performance, class averages, and exam trends.
Preview · Analytics Chart
📱
Parent Portal
Mobile-first parent app for real-time updates, messaging teachers, and viewing academic progress.
Preview · Parent App Screen
🔔
Smart Notifications
Contextual push alerts for parents, staff, and students — triggered by events, fees and other important information.
Preview · Notification Feed

🏦 HNB Bank Integration

Banking-grade trust, without handling transactions

Lernuz connects schools with trusted banks to enable secure, transparent fee awareness — while payments continue through regular bank channels.


⚡
Timely fee reminders
Parents receive updates on due dates, deadlines, and upcoming payments — ensuring nothing is missed.
🔐
Bank-level trust & awareness
Schools are connected with verified banks, giving confidence in secure, reliable fee handling outside the platform.
📱
Clear fee breakdowns
Parents can view detailed fee structures, pending amounts, and timelines — all in one place.
✦ Smart Advertising

A new visibility channel for schools

Lernuz enables schools to showcase trusted bank and brand messages across key touchpoints — ensuring the right information reaches the right audience at the right time.

📡 Advertising Dashboard — Admin View

✦ How It Works

One seamless ecosystem

Every stakeholder connected, every process automated, every insight surfaced.

🏫
School
Admins set up classes, fees, and schedules in minutes
🤖
Lernuz Platform
IN lernuz you manage your school from one place, and surfaces insights automatically
👨‍👩‍👧
Parent
Real-time updates, fee payment, and direct communication
🏦
HNB Bank
Secure payment processing and financial reconciliation
